required_preferences.fact: Discontinues weekend hikes and replaces them with light indoor exercise or rest per doctor’s restrictions; will reconsider outdoor treks only with medical approval

supersedes.fact: Goes on weekend hikes each Saturday unless weather is poor — never substitutes with indoor activities

required_preferences.fact: Uses the co-op's integrated digital portal for all supplier issues and communications — calls are reserved only for non-platform emergencies; no longer contacts suppliers directly by phone for routine matters

supersedes.fact: Responds to supplier issues by calling directly; never relies solely on email communication for urgent matters

required_preferences.fact: Learns new software by watching tutorial videos in early mornings — never attends external training sessions
Prepares simple hot dinners on tutoring evenings, ensuring the meal is ready for his wife and sons when they return home late
Experiments with new menu items monthly using featured fresh ingredients provided at co-op discount — avoids old supplier surplus deals
Checks emails and messages only before opening; never during customer rush periods

persona: A small business owner managing payroll for five employees
